title: Vercel Ship 2026 recap
whyItMatters: For a decade, Vercel has shaped how the web gets built. Now, we’re doing the same for agents. The companies that win the next decade will build on infrastructure designed for agents from the start, and over 2,500 people gathered in London this week to do just that at Vercel Ship 2026.
